title: Section 25H
content: 1[25H. Re-employment of retrenched workmen.--Where any workmen are retrenched, and the employer proposes to take into his employ any persons, he shall, in such manner as may be prescribed, give an opportunity 2[to the retrenched workmen who are citizens of India to offer themselves for reemployment and such retrenched workman] who offer themselves for re-employment shall have preference over other persons.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 43 of 1953, s. 3 (w.e.f. 24-10-1953). 2. Subs. by s. 16, ibid., for certain words (w.e.f. 19-12-1964).
